title: ASI Backbone
description: AsiBackbone is a .NET package-family project providing framework-neutral governance primitives for consequential software decision flow, including actor context, constraint evaluation, governance decisions, acknowledgment workflows, audit residue, durable outbox persistence, provider-neutral governance emission, OpenTelemetry projection, signing-provider boundaries, and ASP.NET Core endpoint governance metadata controls. Version 2.2.0 is a compatible minor release on the simplified AsiBackbone package and namespace line that adds an opt-in reduced metadata mode for endpoint governance hot paths, improves endpoint governance dependency-resolution behavior, reduces GovernanceDecision reason-normalization allocation churn, and preserves the 2.x package and namespace boundary.
